title: False Music
description: All C418 Music now Hetzerified! RECCOMMENDED PLAYING WITH THE BROKEN SCRIPT [TBS]
body:
This is basically a resource pack that changes all the C418 music in the overworld to a slowed down version just like how Hetzer's subwoofer lullaby is in The Broken Script!!

If you LOVE Hetzer then this resource pack is for YOU!
